{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Highgold Striker technique
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Highgold Striker technique]] is something [[Lindon]]'s new boundary technique cannot block.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
